name: fal.ai
description: Search, run, and chain 1,000+ generative AI models (image, video, audio, music) from fal.ai's hosted MCP endpoint. Exposes model discovery, schema/pricing lookup, job execution, and file upload tools.

inputs.label: fal API Key
inputs.description: Your fal.ai API key. Sent per request in the Authorization header; used to authenticate and bill model runs against your account.

obtain.instructions:
1. Go to fal.ai/dashboard/keys
2. Sign up or log in
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the key

auth.instructions: Create a fal API key at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys and provide it as FAL_KEY. It is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <FAL_KEY>'.
